avisos: 18 linha(s) simultânea(s) de karaokê foram removidas por deduplicação romaji/PT-BR.

linhasCriadas.texto: Right now I can't move... That is my fate, but...
I won't give up anymore because I have awakened.
My burning, throbbing heart reflects the era...
It has the color of vividly blazing flames...
Crying, though I can't see it right now...
Searching, a guidepost floats up ahead.
I wanna have a pure time!
Everyone's a noble mind!
I'll take out what remains of my youth there,
Believing a sign of Zeta,
beyond the hard times from now!
If these dry lips become wet,
Beyond time, towards a passionate era,
Because I believe it will move...
Believing a sign of Zeta,
beyond the hard times from now...
Oh, I can't help believing you
I've believed we're sure to meet again ever since that day
If we have heart, we'll be called together again
mugen no Energy yobisamasu
Before you get hurt
Find what you can do...Please
Don't throw it away because of this painful age
Until the day we gaze up again
at the blue sky we once saw

linhasCriadas.texto: Kissing softly the star of water that sleeps in blue,
A person who lights the fire of life,

...and call to each other,

because now there is a person looking for you,

linhasCriadas.texto: Kissing softly the star of water that sleeps in blue,
A person who lights the fire of life,
The time, the golden ripple,
is a sigh from the lips of the sky,
The stars of kindness...
...buried in heart flame up...
...and call to each other,
Like wrecked ships wandering on the waves...
Don't cry, any more,
because now there is a person looking for you,
Dying to see you...
Oh, I can't help believing you
I've believed we're sure to meet again ever since that day
If we have heart, we'll be called together again
